title: Evidenced-based recovery times
body_html:
The Department for Works and Pensions has produced evidence-based recovery times which certifying medical practitioners should consider when advising patients of working age

ProcedureRecovery time
LaparoscopicOpen
Abdominal/groin hernia1 - 2 weeks2 - 3 weeks
Appendicectomy1 - 2 weeks2 - 3 weeks
Cholecystectomy2 - 3 weeks3 - 5 weeks
Hysterectomy3 weeks
(laparoscopic-assisted vaginal)		7 weeks
(abdominal)
6
5
